title: veronica spicata subsp. nitens
intro: Veronica spicata subsp. nitens, also known as the shining speedwell or bright blue speedwell, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, due to its potential to reduce inflammation and combat infection. Veronica spicata subsp. nitens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusions, which are commonly used in herbal remedies to leverage its medicinal properties.
